news.headline: Fed's Powell: Tariffs are higher than almost all forecasters expected, but we still don't know where it will come to rest.
Fed's Powell: The Fed does not have a probability forecast of recession, but outside forecasts have raised that probability.
Fed's Powell: The incoming data through this employment report still shows a solid economy.
Fed's Powell: Inflation has come down quite a bit, and unemployment is near maximum employment.
Carrefour increases bid to privatize Brazilian grocery unit; no specific numbers provided.
Fed's Powell: Unhappiness with economy seems rooted in earlier inflation.

news.summary: Jerome H. Powell, the chair of the Federal Reserve, emphasized the central bank's responsibility to prevent a temporary rise in the price level from evolving into a persistent inflation issue.
news.headline: Fed Chair Powell cautions Trump’s tariffs may fuel more inflation & slower growth. Fed’s priority: prevent lasting inflation from temporary price hikes.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, in Chandler, Arizona, DecisionFi, LLC, a fintech company, announced its expansion into underserved consumer markets by offering financing solutions tailored for sectors usually neglected by conventional lenders. Based in Phoenix, the company aims to cater to a wider range of clients and provide support to sectors that are typically marginalized in the lending industry.
news.headline: DecisionFi, LLC expands into underserved markets with new financing solutions; headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona.

news.summary: In the latest issue of FinTech Magazine for April, prominent figures from companies like BBVA, Abzena, Mollie, Yuno, Chainalysis, and Ecommpay share their perspectives on advancements in AI, blockchain, open banking, and financial regulation. This edition, released on April 4, 2025, provides exclusive interviews and insights into the evolving landscape of the financial technology sector. Leaders in the field delve into key topics shaping the industry, offering valuable perspectives on innovation and future trends.
news.headline: BizClik Media launches April edition of FinTech Magazine with exclusive insights from leaders in fintech industry.
Trump vows to stick to his policies despite criticisms. His stance appears inconsistent.

news.summary: In the April releases, valuable perspectives from prominent figures in sustainability and energy sectors are featured, including Johnson Controls, Schneider Electric, Mars, Google, IndianOil, and others. These editions shed light on advancements in artificial intelligence, hydrogen technology, climate solutions, and the transition towards achieving net-zero emissions. The information was made available in London on April 4, 2025.
news.headline: BizClik Media releases April editions of Sustainability Magazine and Energy Digital featuring global leaders in sustainability and energy, including Johnson Controls, Schneider Electric, Mars, Google, IndianOil. Includes insights on AI, hydrogen, climate tech, and net-zero transformation.
Fed's Powell: Progress toward 2% inflation goal has slowed.
Traders boost bets Fed to wait until June to start rate cuts as Powell delivers remarks.
Company WithSecure Corporation announces share repurchase plan on April 4, 2025.

news.summary: Shareholders of BAWAG Group have sanctioned the proposal from both the Management Board and the Supervisory Board for a dividend of €5.50 per share for the fiscal year 2024.
news.headline: BAWAG Group's shareholders approve €5.50 per share dividend for 2024 financial year.
Sanoma Corporation buys back its shares on 04/04/2025.
Fed's Powell: The Fed is closely watching the tension between hard and soft data.
Fed's Powell: Uncertainty is high and downside risks have risen, but the economy is still in a good place.
Fed's Powell: Surveys show dimming expectations, higher uncertainty due to new federal policies, especially trade.

news.summary: North Dakota is gearing up for an exciting spring season in 2025, offering visitors the opportunity for epic road trips filled with adventure. Travelers can explore the state's picturesque landscapes, immerse themselves in its rich history, and discover unique attractions at their leisure. From hiking through the Badlands to indulging in local cuisine, every mile traveled presents new and exciting experiences. Don't miss out on the chance to embark on unforgettable journeys through North Dakota this spring.
news.headline: North Dakota offers spring road trips with stunning landscapes and unique attractions for epic multi-day adventures.

news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, on April 4, 2025, Tony Lama Boots, known for their Western footwear, introduced the Ranchero Collection. This new line combines traditional Western design with comfort for extended wear. Catering to individuals embracing the Western lifestyle, this collection is designed for those who embody hard work and cowboy spirit.
news.headline: Tony Lama introduces new Ranchero Collection for men and women, blending Western style and comfort.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 4, 2025, an inventor from Orangeburg, S.C. shared their motivation behind creating the COMFORT ME pillow, aiming to bring added comfort to those coping with loss. The inventor expressed the desire for their design to provide a sense of closeness, connection, and solace. This innovative pillow is designed to offer emotional support and features a unique design tailored to provide comfort during difficult times.
news.headline: Inventor from Orangeburg, S.C. creates COMFORT ME pillow to provide comfort after losing a loved one.
Fed's Powell: Outlook is highly uncertain, with elevated risks of higher unemployment and higher inflation.
Fed's Powell: Data shows solid growth, labor market in balance, and inflation much closer to, but still above the 2% goal.

news.summary: Amid growing concerns over global trade tensions, the Bureau of Labor Statistics released a report indicating a significant jump in nonfarm payrolls by 228,000 in March. This figure surpassed economists' predictions of 135,000, leading to a positive reaction from the economic community. Gregory Daco, Chief Economist at EY, described the jobs report as "reassuring" while acknowledging a slowdown in metrics such as wage growth and participation. The upbeat employment data comes at a time when fears of a worldwide trade conflict are unsettling markets. For further details on this news, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Strong jobs report with 228,000 nonfarm payrolls in March, surpassing forecast of 135,000. Economists note slowing wage growth and participation.
Fed's Powell: Most measures of long-term inflation remain well-anchored.
Fed's Powell: The Fed's obligation is to make certain that one-time increase in price levels don't become an ongoing inflation problem.
Fed's Powell: Tariffs are likely to raise inflation in coming quarters. More persistent effects are possible.

news.summary: Today, the stock market saw a significant downturn as sellers took control following China's decision to impose a 34% tariff on all imports from the U.S. Stocks, oil prices, and yields all experienced a sharp decline in response to this retaliatory action. Particularly noteworthy was the plunge in Nvidia stock, which fell below the 100 mark. This development was prominently featured in Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Stock market plunges as China imposes 34% tariff on U.S. imports, Nvidia stock crashes below $100 mark.
Fed's Powell: It's too soon to say what will be the appropriate path for monetary policy.
Fed's Powell: It's becoming clear that tariff increases will be significantly larger than expected. The same is true of economic effects.

news.summary: Jerome H. Powell, the chair of the Federal Reserve, emphasized the central bank's responsibility to prevent a temporary surge in the price level from evolving into a persistent inflation issue.
news.headline: Powell cautions Trump's tariffs could fuel more inflation and slower growth; Fed must prevent ongoing inflation surge.
Fed's Powell: The Fed is well-positioned to wait for greater clarity before considering policy adjustments.

news.summary: The 10-year Treasury saw its most successful week since August, with yields dropping below 4% due to a flight to safety in the market. Investors moving away from risky assets sought government bonds, leading to a rise in Treasury prices and benefiting the iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (NASDAQ:TLT). TLT has gained 6.53% year-to-date and 2.03% in the last month, showing strong technical performance by trading above its five-, 20-, and 50-day averages. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: 10-year Treasury sees biggest weekly gain since August as yields drop below 4%. iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (TLT) up 6.53% YTD and 2.03% in past month. Trading higher than 5-, 20-, and 50-day averages.

news.summary: In New York on April 4, 2025, Noble Panacea shared the unfortunate news of the death of their distinguished founder, Professor Sir Fraser Stoddart. Dr. Benjie Limketkai, serving as the Chief Technology Officer and a Board Member, expressed condolences on behalf of the company. Professor Stoddart, an exceptional leader and Nobel Laureate, made significant contributions as an outstanding Chair Professor. His legacy will be remembered with great reverence by the academic and scientific community.
news.headline: Noble Panacea appoints Dr. Benjie Limketkai as new CTO and board member following the passing of founder Sir Fraser Stoddart.

news.summary: Following new retaliatory measures from China against the United States, President Trump criticized Beijing's actions, stating they had made a mistake.
news.headline: Trump remains defiant amidst market turmoil caused by new tariffs. China retaliates against US, prompting Trump to critique Beijing's actions.

news.summary: Victoria, Seychelles - On April 4, 2025, Bitget, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange and Web3 enterprise, revealed the addition of StakeStone (STO) to their platform. STO is a decentralized omnichain liquidity infrastructure protocol. The trading for STO/USDT officially began on April 3, 2025, at 10:30 (UTC).
news.headline: Bitget lists StakeStone (STO) in Innovation, DeFi, LSD Zone on 4/4/25. STO/USDT trading started 3/4/25 at 10:30 (UTC).
$9.6 trillion in value lost by U.S. stock market since Inauguration Day.
Drivers of electric vehicles are motivated by concerns for the environment and the welfare of animals.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 4, 2025, an inventor from West Columbia, S.C., shared their motivation for creating a novel way to monitor crochet progress. The software developer introduced the CROCHET IOT DEVICE, aiming to revolutionize stitch counting during crocheting. This innovative device tracks stitches in real-time, providing a comprehensive overview of the work in progress.
news.headline: Inventor from West Columbia, S.C., creates Crochet IoT device (CSK-703) to track stitches in real-time.
JPMorgan expects ECB to deliver an additional interest rate cut in April vs the prior forecast of cuts in June and September.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, in Atlanta, a prominent media brand for entrepreneurs disclosed that Invisors, a provider of Workday services, secured the 139th spot on its fifth annual Inc. Regionals: Southeast ranking. This list recognizes top businesses in the region.
news.headline: Invisors named No.139 on Inc.'s 2025 Fastest-Growing Private Companies in Southeast list.
Trump: Powell is always late.
Trump: This would be a perfect time for Powell to cut interest rates.

news.summary: In the latest episode of the podcast Digital Disruption by Info-Tech Research Group, bestselling author Daniel Pink discusses the concept of "the great sort", which is reshaping work and leadership in the post-pandemic era. This episode marks the sixth installment of the podcast, emphasizing the significance of adapting to the changing landscape. Daniel Pink provides insights on how current leaders can effectively navigate through these transformations and offers valuable perspectives on the evolving dynamics within the workplace. This engaging conversation sheds light on critical aspects affecting businesses and professionals in the present-day scenario.
news.headline: Bestselling author Daniel Pink discusses post-pandemic leadership in the sixth episode of Digital Disruption podcast.
Toyota will cover US suppliers' higher costs tied to Trump tariffs - Nikkei.

news.summary: Matador Resources Co (NYSE: MTDR) saw a drop in shares following the announcement of the sale of its remaining Eagle Ford shale assets in South Texas. The assets in La Salle, Karnes, and Atascosa Counties were sold in a series of transactions. Matador's founder, chairman, and CEO, Joseph Wm. Foran, revealed that the company's focus will shift to developing high-quality acreage in the northern Delaware Basin, known as the most productive basin in the U.S. Matador currently holds approximately 200,000 net acres in the basin.
news.headline: Matador Resources Co sells Eagle Ford assets, plans buybacks, shifts focus to Delaware Basin with 200,000 net acres.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Gente (jen.chi) Beauty, a groundbreaking Brazilian body care company, unveiled its inaugural product line in the United States specifically tailored for self-lymphatic drainage therapy. The company also disclosed a significant financial backing from Webster Capital, their primary investor, marking a crucial milestone in their expansion efforts.
news.headline: Webster Capital invests significantly in Gente Beauty, a Brazilian body care brand, launching first US self-lymphatic drainage product line.
Trump: Vietnam's Lam told me that Vietnam wants to cut their tariffs down to zero if they are able to make an agreement with the US.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, the Board of Grigeo Group AB announced their plans to submit information and documents to the upcoming Annual General Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for April 28, 2025.
news.headline: Grigeo Group AB proposes to pay EUR 0.06 dividend per share for 2024 at the upcoming Annual General Meeting on 28th April 2025.
